allow: Bash(node -e "const lucide = require\('lucide-react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(lucide\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('linked'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('insta'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('social'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('share'\)\); console.log\(keys.join\('\\n'\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const lucide = require\('lucide-react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(lucide\).filter\(k => !k.startsWith\('Lucide'\) && !k.endsWith\('Icon'\)\); const social = keys.filter\(k => ['Twitter','Facebook','Youtube','Github','Gitlab','Twitch','Rss','AtSign','Globe','Link','ExternalLink'].some\(s => k.includes\(s\)\)\); console.log\(social.join\('\\n'\)\);")
